Dashboard.Headline: News
Dashboard.Summary: Tesla's stock surged by 7% following the announcement of record deliveries in Q3 2023. Trending on social media with #TeslaRecordDeliveries.

Dashboard.Headline: Financials
Dashboard.Summary: Q3 2023 revenue reported at $28.3 billion, a 19% increase from the previous quarter. EPS at $2.14, exceeding analyst expectations.

Dashboard.Headline: Supply Chain
Dashboard.Summary: Tesla faces minor disruptions due to semiconductor shortages, but maintains 85% of production capacity. Expected resolution by December 2023.

Dashboard.Headline: Raw Material Costs
Dashboard.Summary: Lithium prices fell by 2.5% to $65,000 per ton, reducing battery production costs by 1.8% and improving margins.

Dashboard.Headline: EV Transition
Dashboard.Summary: Tesla ahead in EV market adoption with 60% market share in the US. Plans to introduce new battery technology by 2024.

Dashboard.Headline: Regulatory
Dashboard.Summary: New California emissions regulations effective January 2024 could boost Tesla sales by 5% due to tax incentives.
